channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Injured Brad Marchand returns to the Boston ice with the Panthers
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Brad Marchand stepped back onto the ice at the TD Garden on Tuesday — this time in a Panthers practice jersey as the longtime Bruins player returned to Boston for the first time since he was traded to Florida.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tiger Woods says he had surgery after rupturing his Achilles tendon, an injury likely to keep him out of the Masters
item.description: The Masters is April 10-13. Woods set the Masters record last year by making the cut for the 24th time in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Big 12 commissioner believes NCAA Tournament expansion is due. He says 76 teams is the right number
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Big 12 commissioner Brett Yormark is in favor of expanding the men's NCAA Tournament to 76 teams, and he believes a decision could come in the next few months, opening the possibility of proposed changes being implemented as soon as next year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Donald Trump has been 'the facilitator' in PGA-LIV discussions, Jay Monahan says
item.description: PGA commissioner Jay Monahan said on Tuesday that President Donald Trump has been "the facilitator" of the tour's discussions with LIV Golf.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: West Virginia's Rodriguez bans TikTok dancing. He says videos erase 'hard edge' team should portray
item.description: West Virginia coach Rich Rodriguez, like all football coaches, wants his players to show up on time, work hard and play their best.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles send Gardner-Johnson to Texans. Vikings bolster offensive, defensive lines in NFL free agency
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles' top-ranked defense is getting a major makeover a month after ending Patrick Mahomes' bid to lead the Kansas City Chiefs to a third consecutive Super Bowl title.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry becomes investor in Unrivaled Basketball
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Stephen Curry has joined Unrivaled basketball as an investor. The Golden State Warriors guard is the latest sports star to join the 3v3 basketball league as an investor, joining the likes of the NBA's Giannis Antetokounmpo and Carmelo Anthony, and tennis star Coco Gauff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: QB Daniel Jones agrees to a 1-year, $14 million deal with the Colts, AP source says
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Indianapolis Colts wanted someone to challenge quarterback Anthony Richardson for the starting job. They opted for Daniel Jones.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Argentina puts 7 of Maradona’s healthcare professionals on trial
item.description: BUENOS AIRES (AP) — An Argentine court started on Tuesday its trial of seven healthcare professionals accused of negligence in the death of soccer great Diego Maradona, at age 60. Maradona was under the care of those professionals when he had a cardiac arrest in a house outside Buenos Aires on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings focus up front in free agency by reaching deals with DT Jonathan Allen, G Will Fries
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings continued an aggressive reconstruction of the interior lines on Tuesday by agreeing to terms on contracts with former Washington defensive tackle Jonathan Allen and former Indianapolis guard Will Fries, who followed center Ryan Kelly from the Colts to the Vik
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New York Yankees ace Gerrit Cole to have season-ending Tommy John surgery
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Yankees ace Gerrit Cole will have season-ending Tommy John surgery on his right elbow on Tuesday. The Yankees said the 34-year-old right-hander was examined Monday by Dr. Neal ElAttrache at the Cedars-Sinai Kerlan-Jobe Institute in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Grady Jarrett agrees to terms with Bears hours after Falcons release 2-time Pro Bowler: reports
item.description: Grady Jarrett's time in free agency didn't last long after he reportedly agreed to terms with the Chicago Bears hours after the Atlanta Falcons released him on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eddie George relishes challenge in taking over at Bowling Green
item.description: BOWLING GREEN, Ohio (AP) — Eddie George was pondering the next steps in his burgeoning career as a college football coach while driving back from the NFL scouting combine. He got a sign in the most unlikely of places.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UCLA and South Carolina are 1-2 in women's AP Top 25; No. 6 TCU has highest ranking in its history
item.description: UCLA vaulted back up to No. 1 in The Associated Press women's basketball Top 25 on Monday after beating USC for the Big Ten title over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bowling Green hires former NFL star running back Eddie George as coach
item.description: Bowling Green hired former NFL running back and Tennessee State coach Eddie George on Sunday as the Falcons' head coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs WR Xavier Worthy released after prosecutor declines charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utah's comeback falls short in 4-3 overtime loss
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - Connor Bedard scored at 3:10 of overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory against the Utah Hockey Club at United Center on Friday. Bedard circled the net and scored from the slot after going eight games without a goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Central, GJ, Fruita baseball start 2025 with wins as Palisade falls on day 1 of the Bill Fanning Classic
item.description: It was a busy first day of baseball action across the Grand Valley on day one of the Bill Fanning Classic.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Cathedral Catholic 3, Granite Hills 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Volleyball action on Wednesday night Cathedral Catholic beat Granite Hills in three sets.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox reassign top 2 prospects to minor-league camp, team announces Thursday
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. — The White Sox reassigned two of their top prospects to minor-league camp, one a west suburban native, the team announced Thursday morning prior to its spring training game against the San Francisco Giants.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Volleyball: The Bishop's School 3, La Jolla 1
item.description: Boys Volleyball matchup is the battle of Pearl street between The Bishop's school Knights and La Jolla Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 59, Fairmont Prep 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- 2025 CIF State Boys Basketball Championships Division I Carlsbad defeated Fairmont Prep 59-55. The visitors made the trek from Anaheim, and they could not slow down UCSD commit Jake Hall who hit for a game high 32 points for the Lancers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Men charged in deaths of 3 Chiefs fans found dead in backyard
item.description: Ricky Johnson, 38; Clayton McGeeney, 36; and David Harrington, 37, were all found dead in their friend’s Kansas City backyard on January 9, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose home finale to West Virginia, 71-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Senior Night did not go the way the Utes basketball hoped. Javon Small scored 18 points to help West Virginia beat its former coach Josh Eilert and Utah 71-69 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
